_README: Curated Amazon products. The bot posts these to the channel with your affiliate tag, no live API needed. Per Amazon's terms we do NOT show a static price (prices must be pulled live via their API); the post links to Amazon where the current price shows. Each product needs: asin, title, image. Optional: images[], note (a short Hebrew hook), category. Add as many as you like; the bot rotates through the ones it hasn't posted yet. To find the ASIN: it's the 10-char code in the product URL (…/dp/B0XXXXXXXX). To get the image URL: right-click the main product photo on Amazon -> Copy Image Address.

products.title: Echo Dot (5th Gen) Smart Speaker with Alexa
